name: system-cli-subagents
description: Dispatch research and draft tasks to a single-account freebuff2api worker.

interface.longDescription: Use a local freebuff2api service as a single-account worker for research, drafting, and code exploration. Codex sends tasks, the worker returns compact structured results, and no native subagent or multi-account pool is promised.
interface.defaultPrompt: Send this task to the local freebuff2api worker and return a concise structured result.
